Products.title: Product Introduction
Products.p1_desc: An automatic fire extinguishing solution for fires in medium and large electric panels
Products.p2_desc: An automatic fire extinguishing solution for fires in small electric panels
Products.p4_desc: Prevention of fire spreading through the incoming/outgoing wires of the electrical panel
Products.p5_desc: A fire extinguishing solution for fires in the cable
Products.p6_desc: The world's first automatic fire extinguishing multi-outlet
